headline: PepsiCo (PEP) Launches RegenLend And Captain D's Seafood Promotion
summary: PepsiCo (NasdaqGS:PEP) has launched RegenLend, a pilot program aimed at helping farmers adopt soil conservation practices by easing equipment cost burdens. The company developed RegenLend with support from agricultural and environmental partners, targeting more sustainable practices across its supply chain. Separately, PepsiCo is partnering with Captain D's on the Alaska Family Cruise Sweepstakes to promote responsibly sourced seafood and cross-brand engagement. For investors watching how...
